label.purpose: Kickers, metadata, 01/02 markers — Geist Mono. Earned, not costume.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards lift on hover only; flat at rest.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft blue shadow under the hero network visual — atmosphere, not UI.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Node pulses and general state transitions.

motion.name: node-pulse
motion.purpose: Staggered glow behind each network node.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The only text-bearing brand-colored action. Solid blue, near-white text.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Become a member <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; height:2.25rem; padding:0 1rem; border:none; border-radius:0.75rem; background:oklch(0.49 0.19 254); color:oklch(0.99 0.01 240); font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:oklch(0.49 0.19 254 / 0.85); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(0.49 0.19 254 / 0.5); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary navigation — white surface, ink text, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; height:2.25rem; padding:0 1rem; border:1px solid oklch(0.90 0.014 250); border-radius:0.75rem; background:oklch(1 0 0); color:oklch(0.22 0.035 258); font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:oklch(0.965 0.012 250); }

components.name: Focus-Area Tag
components.description: Quiet inventory pill from the hero — what ITSA covers.
components.css: .ds-tag { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; padding:0.25rem 0.75rem; border:1px solid oklch(0.90 0.014 250); border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.95 0.02 250 / 0.5); color:oklch(0.35 0.09 254); font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; }

components.name: Feature Row
components.description: The de-slopped 'Why join' row — icon tile + mono index + title + copy, hairline divided (not a card).
components.html:
02

Hands-on workshops

Web development, cybersecurity, cloud, and more — practical, beginner-friendly sessions.
components.css: .ds-feature { display:flex; gap:1.25rem; padding:1.5rem 0; border-top:1px solid oklch(0.90 0.014 250); } .ds-feature-ic { flex:none; display:grid; place-items:center; width:3rem; height:3rem; border-radius:0.75rem; background:oklch(0.49 0.19 254 / 0.10); color:oklch(0.49 0.19 254); transition:background 0.3s, color 0.3s; } .ds-feature:hover .ds-feature-ic { background:oklch(0.49 0.19 254); color:oklch(0.99 0.01 240); } .ds-feature-head { display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:0.75rem; } .ds-feature-idx { font-family:'Geist Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.75rem; color:oklch(0.44 0.035 256); } .ds-feature h3 { font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif; font-size:1.125rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.025em; margin:0; color:oklch(0.22 0.035 258); } .ds-feature p { margin:0.375rem 0 0; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; line-height:1.6; color:oklch(0.44 0.035 256); }

components.name: Sticky Header
components.description: Translucent blurred sticky bar; active link gets a short blue underline bar.
components.html: HomeEventsJoin
components.css: .ds-nav { display:inline-flex; gap:0.25rem; padding:0.5rem; border-radius:0.75rem; background:oklch(0.99 0.006 240 / 0.7); backdrop-filter:blur(8px); } .ds-nav-link { position:relative; padding:0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius:0.375rem; font-family:Geist,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:oklch(0.44 0.035 256); text-decoration:none; transition:color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color:oklch(0.22 0.035 258); } .ds-nav-link.is-active { color:oklch(0.22 0.035 258); } .ds-nav-bar { position:absolute; left:0.75rem; right:0.75rem; bottom:-1px; height:2px; border-radius:9999px; background:oklch(0.49 0.19 254); }

narrative.overview: ITSA's identity descends from its molecular logo — vivid blue and cyan nodes wired to warm orange ones. Nodes are students and skills; links are the community. Blue carries the promise (legit, organized); orange is the human spark. A committed brand register that is confident and credible without ever becoming a stiff corporate intranet, a generic SaaS/AI template, or an amateur club page.
keyCharacteristics: Committed blue identity, orange as the intentional spark — straight from the logo.
Light by default (a phone glance in daylight), with a real dark mode.
Expressive grotesque headings (Bricolage) over a neutral, readable body (Geist).
The network motif (nodes + links + soft dot field) recurs as the signature texture.
Warm, direct, peer-to-peer voice. Confident, never bureaucratic.

rules.name: The Orange-Is-A-Spark Rule
rules.body: Orange never carries body text or a text button. It is nodes, glows, gradient tips, hover energy — a minority voice (≤15% of a screen) for warmth, not information.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: The background is cool-white or a saturated brand fill. Warm/cream/sand backgrounds are forbidden — the 2026 AI default that fights the logo's cool blues.

rules.name: The One-Kicker Rule
rules.body: A mono kicker appears once, in the hero. Repeating a tiny uppercase eyebrow above every section is forbidden AI scaffolding.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default; depth is tonal. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus).

dos: Do treat the logo as the source of truth: blue nodes, orange spark, links between them.
Do keep Brand Blue as the single action color and orange as decoration/energy only.
Do lead sections with the headline; use the mono kicker exactly once (hero).
Do keep body text at Muted Ink or darker — verify 4.5:1.
Do ship the network SVG (or real student photography) as hero imagery.
Do render h1–h4 in Bricolage Grotesque; keep body/UI in Geist.
donts: Don't build a stiff corporate intranet — no grey enterprise chrome or bureaucratic layouts.
Don't ship the generic SaaS/AI template: no cream bg, per-section uppercase eyebrows, four identical icon-cards, or gradient-clipped headings.
Don't drift toward an amateur club page — no clip art, clashing colors, mismatched fonts.
Don't put white text on orange or use orange for a primary button (contrast fails).
Don't use colored border-left/right stripes or arbitrary z-index values.
Don't reintroduce dark-only — light is the default, dark is a maintained mode.
